name: Zhuzhou CRRC Times Electric Co., Ltd.
summary: Zhuzhou CRRC Times Electric Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, in the research, development, designs, manufactures, and sells railway transportation equipment products, and provision of relevant services primarily in Mainland China and internationally. The company also produces propulsion and control systems for trains and electric vehicles, signaling systems, power supply solutions, platform screen doors, rail maintenance vehicles, marine engineering equipment, and component products for various applications. Its products for rolling stock and railways include EMU, locomotive, and mass transit systems; and components products consist of semiconductors, resistors, reactors, radiators, sensors, power capacitors, and heatsinks. The company's energy and industrial products comprise marine engineering, electric vehicle, and inverter and converter systems, as well as provides railway maintenance and construction machines. The company was formerly known as Zhuzhou CSR Times Electric Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Zhuzhou CRRC Times Electric Co., Ltd. in March 2016. The company was founded in 2005 and is based in Wanchai, Hong Kong.
